page: Microsoft Azure EC64ads_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ECADSv5 family. It is equipped with 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 512.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This server includes 2458 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. There are no integrated GPU accelerators on this instance.

The high memory density relative to the dedicated AMD vCPUs provides qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring substantial memory footprints without the overhead of extra compute cores. However, the lack of hardware accelerators like GPUs limits its utility for machine learning acceleration. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive applications, large-scale databases, enterprise applications, and memory-bound data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure EC64ads_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance from the ECADSv5 family, powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs and 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For storage-heavy operations, the instance is equipped with 2458 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage. It does not include integrated GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This configuration offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound workloads by balancing a large memory footprint with dedicated compute resources. The hardware profile is suited for large-scale databases, memory-intensive enterprise applications, and data processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC64ads_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and 2458 GB of local storage for memory-intensive database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC64ads_v5 is an x86_64 server with 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: An AMD-powered, memory-optimized instance featuring sixty-four dedicated vCPUs, substantial RAM density, and high-capacity local storage for enterprise databases.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
2458 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Suited for large-scale databases and memory-intensive enterprise applications
